allow: PowerShell($f = Get-Item "C:\\Users\\maxwa\\WTSZurWay\\apps\\web\\.next\\trace" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($f\) { $f | Format-List Name, Attributes, IsReadOnly, LastWriteTime; Write-Host "ACL:"; \(Get-Acl $f.FullName\).Access | Format-List IdentityReference, FileSystemRights, AccessControlType })

PowerShell($cutoff = \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-15\); Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt $cutoff } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Stopping node PID $\($_.Id\) started $\($_.StartTime\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction Continue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
